name: Preliminary Phase
description: Establishes architecture capability, principles, and governance framework

name: Phase A: Architecture Vision
description: Develops high-level aspirational vision and obtains approval

name: Phase B: Business Architecture
description: Develops the Business Architecture to support the Architecture Vision

name: Phase E: Opportunities and Solutions
description: Generates initial implementation and migration plan

name: Phase F: Migration Planning
description: Finalizes detailed implementation and migration plan

name: Phase B Business Process Modeling
description: Modeling business processes for target architecture

name: Phase B Business Function Decomposition
description: Decomposing business functions to atomic level

name: Phase C Data Entity Modeling
description: Modeling logical data entities and relationships

name: Phase D Platform Selection
description: Selecting technology platforms for target architecture

name: Phase D Network Architecture Design
description: Designing network topology and security zones

name: Phase E Consolidation Gaps
description: Consolidating gaps from all architecture domains

name: Phase E Work Package Identification
description: Identifying discrete work packages for migration

name: Phase F Business Value Assessment
description: Assessing business value of work packages

name: Phase G Compliance Review Setup
description: Setting up architecture compliance review process

name: Phase H Change Impact Analysis
description: Analyzing impact of proposed architecture changes

name: Phase H Architecture Refresh Trigger
description: Identifying triggers for architecture refresh cycles

name: Principles Catalog
description: Catalog of architecture principles with rationale and implications

name: Stakeholder Map Catalog
description: Catalog of stakeholders with power, interest, and concerns

name: Value Chain Diagram
description: Visual representation of enterprise value chain activities

name: Solution Concept Diagram
description: High-level visual of proposed solution approach

name: Business Interaction Matrix
description: Matrix of interactions between business functions

name: Actor/Role Matrix
description: Mapping of actors to their roles

name: Business Footprint Diagram
description: Mapping of business goals to organizational units

name: Architecture Board Minutes
description: Decisions and actions from board meetings

name: Stakeholder Management Technique
description: Identifying, classifying, and managing stakeholder engagement

name: Business Scenarios Technique
description: Using scenarios to discover and document requirements

name: Gap Analysis Technique
description: Identifying gaps between baseline and target

name: Value Chain Analysis
description: Analyzing value chain for optimization opportunities

name: Event Storming for Architecture
description: Using event storming for architecture discovery

name: Architecture Runway Planning
description: Planning architecture runway for agile delivery

name: Capability
description: Ability to employ resources to achieve goals

name: Value Stream
description: Sequence of activities creating stakeholder value

name: Business Actor
description: Organizational entity capable of performing behavior

name: Business Collaboration
description: Aggregate of roles performing collective behavior

name: Business Interface
description: Point of access for business services

name: Business Process
description: Sequence of business behaviors achieving a result

name: Business Function
description: Collection of behavior based on criteria

name: Business Object
description: Concept relevant from a business perspective

name: Contract
description: Formal or informal specification of agreement

name: Product
description: Coherent collection of services with contract

name: Application Collaboration
description: Aggregate of components performing collective behavior

name: Application Interface
description: Point of access for application services

name: Application Service
description: Externally visible unit of app functionality

name: Node
description: Computational or physical resource hosting artifacts

name: Technology Collaboration
description: Aggregate of nodes performing collective behavior

name: Technology Interface
description: Point of access for technology services

name: Path
description: Link between two or more nodes

name: Technology Service
description: Externally visible unit of tech functionality

name: Artifact
description: Piece of data used or produced

name: Stakeholder
description: Role of individual or organization with interest

name: Driver
description: External or internal condition motivating change

name: Assessment
description: Result of analysis of a driver

name: Work Package
description: Series of actions to achieve a result

name: Organization Viewpoint
description: Shows organizational structure of an enterprise

name: Product Viewpoint
description: Shows value a product offers to customers

name: Application Cooperation Viewpoint
description: Shows application components and their relationships

name: Application Usage Viewpoint
description: Shows how applications are used by business processes

name: Information Structure Viewpoint
description: Shows information structure including data types

name: Service Realization Viewpoint
description: Shows how services are realized by behavior and components

name: Implementation and Deployment Viewpoint
description: Shows how applications map to technology

name: Landscape Map Viewpoint
description: Shows architecture elements in a grid layout

name: Goal Realization Viewpoint
description: Shows how goals are realized through requirements

name: Requirements Realization Viewpoint
description: Shows how requirements are realized by elements

name: Motivation Viewpoint
description: Shows motivational elements and their relationships

name: Strategy Viewpoint
description: Shows strategic course of action and resources

name: Capability Map Viewpoint
description: Shows business capabilities and their relationships
